TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Samingaz
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: aiza tu tasa uvaaz uh inkaduan masia sisiuh izaun saicia saipuk at.
S.PHON: aiða tu tasa uvaað ux~χ inkaduan maɕia ɕiɕiux~χ iðaun saiʨia saipuk at.
S.FORM: aiza tu tasa uvaaz uh inkaduan masia sisiuh izaun saicia saipuk at.
S.PHON: aiða tu tasa uvaað ux~χ inkaduan maɕia ɕiɕiux~χ iðaun saiʨia saipuk at.
S.TRANSL: 有一個孩子撿到一隻青蛙,他把他抓起來養.
There is a kid who found a frog and kept it.

S.FORM: aiza amin saicia asu.
S.PHON: aiða amin saiʨia asu.
S.FORM: aiza amin saicia asu.
S.PHON: aiða amin saiʨia asu.
S.TRANSL: 然後他也有狗.
He also has a dog.

S.FORM: a min'unin mas isaicia tu tas tu lumah.
S.PHON: a minʔunin mas isaiʨia tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: a min'unin mas isaicia tu tas tu lumah.
S.PHON: a minʔunin mas isaiʨia tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他們成了一家人.
They became a family.

S.FORM: a maupacia naia tu madaidaz mas sisiuhcin a pin'uni mas naicia tu tas tu lumah ungat aiza tu sanavan naia hai masabah.
S.PHON: a maupaʨia naia tu madaidað mas ɕiɕiux~χʨin a pinʔuni mas naiʨia tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χ uŋat aiða tu sanavan naia x~χai masabax~χ.
S.FORM: a maupacia naia tu madaidaz mas sisiuhcin a pin'uni mas naicia tu tas tu lumah ungat aiza tu sanavan naia hai masabah.
S.PHON: a maupaʨia naia tu madaidað mas ɕiɕiux~χʨin a pinʔuni mas naiʨia tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χ uŋat aiða tu sanavan naia x~χai masabax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他們那樣疼愛這個青蛙,使他們成為一家人.然後有一個晚上,他們在睡覺.
They love the frog so much. They are a family. One night they are sleeping.

S.FORM: a nii tu haiaphaiap sia masabah tu sia labiancin hai sisiuha hai kikilim mas isaicia tu sia dangian tu 'asang.
S.PHON: a nii tu x~χaiapx~χaiap ɕia masabax~χ tu ɕia l~ɬabianʨin x~χai ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai kikil~ɬim mas isaiʨia tu ɕia daŋian tu ʔasaŋ.
S.FORM: a nii tu haiaphaiap sia masabah tu sia labiancin hai sisiuha hai kikilim mas isaicia tu sia dangian tu 'asang.
S.PHON: a nii tu x~χaiapx~χaiap ɕia masabax~χ tu ɕia l~ɬabianʨin x~χai ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai kikil~ɬim mas isaiʨia tu ɕia daŋian tu ʔasaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 不知不覺,在睡覺的這個晚上,那隻青蛙正在找他的住的故鄉.
That night, when they are asleep and unaware, the frog is seeking its hometown.

S.FORM: a maupacia tu kanakanak saia a mindangkaz a sisbai sia amunucia a mudaan kilim mas isaicia tu a tuksisia.
S.PHON: a maupaʨia tu kanakanak saia a mindaŋkað a ɕisbai ɕia amunuʨia a mudaan kil~ɬim mas isaiʨia tu a tukɕiɕia.
S.FORM: a maupacia tu kanakanak saia a mindangkaz a sisbai sia amunucia a mudaan kilim mas isaicia tu a tuksisia.
S.PHON: a maupaʨia tu kanakanak saia a mindaŋkað a ɕisbai ɕia amunuʨia a mudaan kil~ɬim mas isaiʨia tu a tukɕiɕia.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣他自行站起來,離開那個水缸去尋找他的同類.
So it stands up, leave the vat, and go finding its countrymen.

S.FORM: ungat minkailasin mazasia tu uvaaza.
S.PHON: uŋat minkail~ɬaɕin maðaɕia tu uvaaða.
S.FORM: ungat minkailasin mazasia tu uvaaza.
S.PHON: uŋat minkail~ɬaɕin maðaɕia tu uvaaða.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子醒來了.
Then the kid wakes up.

W.TRANSL: 變成-生氣勃勃=改變狀態

S.FORM: ai saduas saicia tu is'uka.
S.PHON: ai saduas saiʨia tu isʔuka.
S.FORM: ai saduas saicia tu is'uka.
S.PHON: ai saduas saiʨia tu isʔuka.
S.TRANSL: 他看到,不見了.
He sees it is no longer there.

S.FORM: a usa maza sisiuha maupacia amin asua tu kikilim a lalunglung tu isa maza sisiuh.
S.PHON: a usa maða ɕiɕiux~χa maupaʨia amin asua tu kikil~ɬim a l~ɬal~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ tu isa maða ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: a usa maza sisiuha maupacia amin asua tu kikilim a lalunglung tu isa maza sisiuh.
S.PHON: a usa maða ɕiɕiux~χa maupaʨia amin asua tu kikil~ɬim a l~ɬal~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ tu isa maða ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 「青蛙在哪裡?」狗也那樣地一直邊吠叫地找.
"Where is the frog?", the dog keeps searching and barking.

S.FORM: unghai a miliskin naia tu ai nakuisa dii sisiuha maupacia tu mapatualiba naia.
S.PHON: uŋx~χai a mil~ɬiskin naia tu ai nakuisa dii ɕiɕiux~χa maupaʨia tu mapatual~ɬiba naia.
S.FORM: unghai a miliskin naia tu ai nakuisa dii sisiuha maupacia tu mapatualiba naia.
S.PHON: uŋx~χai a mil~ɬiskin naia tu ai nakuisa dii ɕiɕiux~χa maupaʨia tu mapatual~ɬiba naia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們想著「咦?青蛙會去哪裡?」他們那樣互相抱著.
They hug each other and consider where the frog went.

S.FORM: tupaun saicia asua tu nakudiip kata kilim mas tu sisiuhcia nii tu haipun tu ka aiza antaban mikua.
S.PHON: tupaun saiʨia asua tu nakudiip kata kil~ɬim mas tu ɕiɕiux~χʨia nii tu x~χaipun tu ka aiða antaban mikua.
S.FORM: tupaun saicia asua tu nakudiip kata kilim mas tu sisiuhcia nii tu haipun tu ka aiza antaban mikua.
S.PHON: tupaun saiʨia asua tu nakudiip kata kil~ɬim mas tu ɕiɕiux~χʨia nii tu x~χaipun tu ka aiða antaban mikua.
S.TRANSL: 他跟狗說:「我們要去找那個青蛙吧?不知道有沒有被拿走還是怎麼了.」
He says to the dog: 'We are going to look for the frog. I have no idea if it is taken away.'

S.FORM: at mudaan naia maupacia tu kikilim massia sisiuh.
S.PHON: at mudaan naia maupaʨia tu kikil~ɬim masɕia ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: at mudaan naia maupacia tu kikilim massia sisiuh.
S.PHON: at mudaan naia maupaʨia tu kikil~ɬim masɕia ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他們出發,那樣一直尋找著青蛙.
Then they went away, looking for the frog like that.

S.FORM: iskanata a iskaisaisa iskavahlas.
S.PHON: iskanata a iskaisaisa iskavax~χl~ɬas.
S.FORM: iskanata a iskaisaisa iskavahlas.
S.PHON: iskanata a iskaisaisa iskavax~χl~ɬas.
S.TRANSL: 他們到外面,到每個地方,到河流.
They went outside, went everywhere, went to the river

S.FORM: aiza tu tasa dangian naicia lukis.
S.PHON: aiða tu tasa daŋian naiʨia l~ɬukis.
S.FORM: aiza tu tasa dangian naicia lukis.
S.PHON: aiða tu tasa daŋian naiʨia l~ɬukis.
S.TRANSL: 他們住的地方有樹.
there is a tree where they live

S.FORM: aizaang maisia laak at maupacia uvaaza miliskin tu haipa nii tu tungnangadah saia laakcia.
S.PHON: aiðaaŋ maiɕia l~ɬaak at maupaʨia uvaaða mil~ɬiskin tu x~χaipa nii tu tuŋnaŋadax~χ saia l~ɬaakʨia.
S.FORM: aizaang maisia laak at maupacia uvaaza miliskin tu haipa nii tu tungnangadah saia laakcia.
S.PHON: aiðaaŋ maiɕia l~ɬaak at maupaʨia uvaaða mil~ɬiskin tu x~χaipa nii tu tuŋnaŋadax~χ saia l~ɬaakʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有洞,孩子想他不知道是不是到洞裡面了.
There is a hole there. Then the child thinks if it hid in the hole.

S.FORM: idii saia malala'la tu sisiuh isa kasu.
S.PHON: idii saia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa tu ɕiɕiux~χ isa kasu.
S.FORM: idii saia malala'la tu sisiuh isa kasu.
S.PHON: idii saia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa tu ɕiɕiux~χ isa kasu.
S.TRANSL: 那裡他一直叫呼:青蛙你在哪裡?
Over there he keeps calling: "Frog where are you?"

S.FORM: ungat maza asu hai usaduan mas isia lukis tu sia itu bahusaz tu sia lumah.
S.PHON: uŋat maða asu x~χai usaduan mas iɕia l~ɬukis tu ɕia itu bax~χusað tu ɕia l~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: ungat maza asu hai usaduan mas isia lukis tu sia itu bahusaz tu sia lumah.
S.PHON: uŋat maða asu x~χai usaduan mas iɕia l~ɬukis tu ɕia itu bax~χusað tu ɕia l~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 然後,狗看到樹上的虎頭蜂窩.
Then, that dog sees the hornet's nest in the tree.

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu isaincia amin a sisiuh at.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu isainʨia amin a ɕiɕiux~χ at.
S.FORM: miliskin saia tu isaincia amin a sisiuh at.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu isainʨia amin a ɕiɕiux~χ at.
S.TRANSL: 他想,青蛙是否也在那邊?
He wonders, is the frog in there, too?

S.FORM: maupacia saia tu malalunglung massia saitu bahusaz tu sia.
S.PHON: maupaʨia saia tu mal~ɬal~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ masɕia saitu bax~χusað tu ɕia.
S.FORM: maupacia saia tu malalunglung massia saitu bahusaz tu sia.
S.PHON: maupaʨia saia tu mal~ɬal~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ masɕia saitu bax~χusað tu ɕia.
S.TRANSL: 他就這樣對著虎頭蜂窩吠叫.
It barks at the hornet's nest like that.

S.FORM: at vuhvuhun a maza sia tu lukisa at nii tu haiap tu bahusaza hai mais vuhvuhun naia hai namun'apav macisbai.
S.PHON: at vux~χvux~χun a maða ɕia tu l~ɬukisa at nii tu x~χaiap tu bax~χusaða x~χai mais vux~χvux~χun naia x~χai namunʔapav maʨisbai.
S.FORM: at vuhvuhun a maza sia tu lukisa at nii tu haiap tu bahusaza hai mais vuhvuhun naia hai namun'apav macisbai.
S.PHON: at vux~χvux~χun a maða ɕia tu l~ɬukisa at nii tu x~χaiap tu bax~χusaða x~χai mais vux~χvux~χun naia x~χai namunʔapav maʨisbai.
S.TRANSL: 樹就搖了,他就不知道搖了後虎頭蜂會逃出來.
Then the tree was shaken. He didn't know the hornets will fly out when being shaken.

S.FORM: isia mavuhvuh tu sia asucin hai kalinastuun kaliumanun maza sia tu bahusaza lananastu at.
S.PHON: iɕia mavux~χvux~χ tu ɕia asuʨin x~χai kal~ɬinastuun kal~ɬiumanun maða ɕia tu bax~χusaða l~ɬananastu at.
S.FORM: isia mavuhvuh tu sia asucin hai kalinastuun kaliumanun maza sia tu bahusaza lananastu at.
S.PHON: iɕia mavux~χvux~χ tu ɕia asuʨin x~χai kal~ɬinastuun kal~ɬiumanun maða ɕia tu bax~χusaða l~ɬananastu at.
S.TRANSL: 狗把虎頭蜂打落到地上.
The dog hits the hornets to the ground.

S.FORM: maza sia tu bahusaza hai minaskun.
S.PHON: maða ɕia tu bax~χusaða x~χai minaskun.
S.FORM: maza sia tu bahusaza hai minaskun.
S.PHON: maða ɕia tu bax~χusaða x~χai minaskun.
S.TRANSL: 那些虎頭蜂聚在一起.
Those hornets were gathering.

S.FORM: hum miliskin tu naizaun asuan kalat.
S.PHON: x~χum mil~ɬiskin tu naiðaun asuan kal~ɬat.
S.FORM: hum miliskin tu naizaun asuan kalat.
S.PHON: x~χum mil~ɬiskin tu naiðaun asuan kal~ɬat.
S.TRANSL: 我想,狗會被拿去咬.
I think the dog would be taken and bitten.

S.FORM: maupacia tu hum mudaan maza sia tu bahusaza namasinap mas sia tu asucia ungat maza uvaaza hai tungnasia lukis dadaza.
S.PHON: maupaʨia tu x~χum mudaan maða ɕia tu bax~χusaða namaɕinap mas ɕia tu asuʨia uŋat maða uvaaða x~χai tuŋnaɕia l~ɬukis dadaða.
S.FORM: maupacia tu hum mudaan maza sia tu bahusaza namasinap mas sia tu asucia ungat maza uvaaza hai tungnasia lukis dadaza.
S.PHON: maupaʨia tu x~χum mudaan maða ɕia tu bax~χusaða namaɕinap mas ɕia tu asuʨia uŋat maða uvaaða x~χai tuŋnaɕia l~ɬukis dadaða.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂就那樣出來追狗,孩子就躲在樹上.
The hornets move that way to chase the dog, and then the child hides at the tree.

S.FORM: aupa aiza laak miliskin saia tu isaincia.
S.PHON: aupa aiða l~ɬaak mil~ɬiskin saia tu isainʨia.
S.FORM: aupa aiza laak miliskin saia tu isaincia.
S.PHON: aupa aiða l~ɬaak mil~ɬiskin saia tu isainʨia.
S.TRANSL: 因為有洞,所以他想會不會在裡面.
Because there is a hole he wonders if it is in there.

S.FORM: idii saia inkaduan isainsianastu tu sia batu tu sia laakcia kudadaza saia lukis tu laakcia malala'la tu isa kasu sisiuh.
S.PHON: idii saia inkaduan isainɕianastu tu ɕia batu tu ɕia l~ɬaakʨia kudadaða saia l~ɬukis tu l~ɬaakʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa tu isa kasu ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.FORM: idii saia inkaduan isainsianastu tu sia batu tu sia laakcia kudadaza saia lukis tu laakcia malala'la tu isa kasu sisiuh.
S.PHON: idii saia inkaduan isainɕianastu tu ɕia batu tu ɕia l~ɬaakʨia kudadaða saia l~ɬukis tu l~ɬaakʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa tu isa kasu ɕiɕiux~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他在那裡找到在下面的石洞,爬上樹洞去,一直叫:「青蛙你在哪裡?」
He founds a stone hole below and climbed up the tree and yelled: "Where are you, frog?"

S.FORM: nii tu haiap tu isian isaicia tu malala'la hai ingadah maza sia tu a it'huua.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiap tu iɕian isaiʨia tu mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa x~χai iŋadax~χ maða ɕia tu a itʔx~χuua.
S.FORM: nii tu haiap tu isian isaicia tu malala'la hai ingadah maza sia tu a it'huua.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaiap tu iɕian isaiʨia tu mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa x~χai iŋadax~χ maða ɕia tu a itʔx~χuua.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道,他一直在叫的是裡面的貓頭鷹.
He didn't know what he kept shouting at is the owl inside.

S.FORM: patahusngian a minkailas saia uh minkailas saia mun'apav hai cinhuza uvaaza muhalhal isnanastucia maisnasialukiscia.
S.PHON: patax~χusŋian a minkail~ɬas saia ux~χ minkail~ɬas saia munʔapav x~χai ʨinx~χuða uvaaða mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ isnanastuʨia maisnaɕial~ɬukisʨia.
S.FORM: patahusngian a minkailas saia uh minkailas saia mun'apav hai cinhuza uvaaza muhalhal isnanastucia maisnasialukiscia.
S.PHON: patax~χusŋian a minkail~ɬas saia ux~χ minkail~ɬas saia munʔapav x~χai ʨinx~χuða uvaaða mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ isnanastuʨia maisnaɕial~ɬukisʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他被吵醒後出來,小孩子被嚇到,從樹上掉下來到地上.
He is waken up and then comes out. The child is shocked, falling from the tree to the ground.

S.FORM: makitmananu tu namasinap maisia asucin maza asu hai maupacia amin tu macisbai sisinapun mas bahusazcia.
S.PHON: makitmananu tu namaɕinap maiɕia asuʨin maða asu x~χai maupaʨia amin tu maʨisbai ɕiɕinapun mas bax~χusaðʨia.
S.FORM: makitmananu tu namasinap maisia asucin maza asu hai maupacia amin tu macisbai sisinapun mas bahusazcia.
S.PHON: makitmananu tu namaɕinap maiɕia asuʨin maða asu x~χai maupaʨia amin tu maʨisbai ɕiɕinapun mas bax~χusaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那些虎頭蜂一窩蜂地要追那隻狗,然而狗就那樣跑給虎頭蜂追.
All the way, those hornets will chase that dog. The dog just runs away like that and is being chased by the hornets.

S.FORM: ungat aupa maza uvaaza hai muhalhal hai cinhuza cinpising.
S.PHON: uŋat aupa maða uvaaða x~χai mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ x~χai ʨinx~χuða ʨinpiɕiŋ.
S.FORM: ungat aupa maza uvaaza hai muhalhal hai cinhuza cinpising.
S.PHON: uŋat aupa maða uvaaða x~χai mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ x~χai ʨinx~χuða ʨinpiɕiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 然後小朋友掉下而驚嚇害怕.
Then the child is shocked and afraid because he falls down.

S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia batu miliskin tu at ana tupa tu maupacia hai nakilimang saia mas sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: kudadaða saia ɕia batu mil~ɬiskin tu at ana tupa tu maupaʨia x~χai nakil~ɬimaŋ saia mas ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia batu miliskin tu at ana tupa tu maupacia hai nakilimang saia mas sisiuhcia.
S.PHON: kudadaða saia ɕia batu mil~ɬiskin tu at ana tupa tu maupaʨia x~χai nakil~ɬimaŋ saia mas ɕiɕiux~χʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他爬到石頭上,想著無論如何,他還是要繼續找那隻青蛙.
He moves on the top of the rock and thinks that he will still keep on looking for that frog even if it is like that.

S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia batucia hai makas'aang saia tu hum aiza maza tu ngabul.
S.PHON: kudadaða saia ɕia batuʨia x~χai makasʔaaŋ saia tu x~χum aiða maða tu ŋabul~ɬ.
S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia batucia hai makas'aang saia tu hum aiza maza tu ngabul.
S.PHON: kudadaða saia ɕia batuʨia x~χai makasʔaaŋ saia tu x~χum aiða maða tu ŋabul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 他爬到石頭上,他期待著鹿.
He climbs up the rock and anticipates the deer.

S.FORM: tusia adii vahaa hai makas'aang tu lukis.
S.PHON: tuɕia adii vax~χaa x~χai makasʔaaŋ tu l~ɬukis.
S.FORM: tusia adii vahaa hai makas'aang tu lukis.
S.PHON: tuɕia adii vax~χaa x~χai makasʔaaŋ tu l~ɬukis.
S.TRANSL: 說到那隻鹿,他以為是樹木.
As for that antler, he thinks it is a tree.

S.FORM: at talidamuan saicia minnadadaza batucia malala'la tu ai sisiuh isa kasu.
S.PHON: at tal~ɬidamuan saiʨia minnadadaða batuʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa tu ai ɕiɕiux~χ isa kasu.
S.FORM: at talidamuan saicia minnadadaza batucia malala'la tu ai sisiuh isa kasu.
S.PHON: at tal~ɬidamuan saiʨia minnadadaða batuʨia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa tu ai ɕiɕiux~χ isa kasu.
S.TRANSL: 他緊抓著,站在石頭上面,一直叫喊:「嘿,青蛙你在哪裡?」
Then he holds it, standing on the rock and yelling out "where are you, frog?"

S.FORM: at maza asua hai makilavi amin mas sia tu uvaazcin tungnangadah sia a batucia a sisbai sia itu bahusaz tusia sinsinapcia.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai makil~ɬavi amin mas ɕia tu uvaaðʨin tuŋnaŋadax~χ ɕia a batuʨia a ɕisbai ɕia itu bax~χusað tuɕia ɕinɕinapʨia.
S.FORM: at maza asua hai makilavi amin mas sia tu uvaazcin tungnangadah sia a batucia a sisbai sia itu bahusaz tusia sinsinapcia.
S.PHON: at maða asua x~χai makil~ɬavi amin mas ɕia tu uvaaðʨin tuŋnaŋadax~χ ɕia a batuʨia a ɕisbai ɕia itu bax~χusað tuɕia ɕinɕinapʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗也跟著這個小孩躲到石頭裡面,逃離虎頭蜂的追趕.
Then that dog follows this kid hide beneath the stone, refraining from being chased by hornets.

W.TRANSL: 工焦<完成貌>追趕=遠距.斜格

S.FORM: at maupacia naia tu malala'la at nii tu haiap tu maza ngabula hai talidamuan maza sia tu a isaicia vahaa hai.
S.PHON: at maupaʨia naia tu mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa at nii tu x~χaiap tu maða ŋabul~ɬa x~χai tal~ɬidamuan maða ɕia tu a isaiʨia vax~χaa x~χai.
S.FORM: at maupacia naia tu malala'la at nii tu haiap tu maza ngabula hai talidamuan maza sia tu a isaicia vahaa hai.
S.PHON: at maupaʨia naia tu mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa at nii tu x~χaiap tu maða ŋabul~ɬa x~χai tal~ɬidamuan maða ɕia tu a isaiʨia vax~χaa x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他們就這樣一直叫,不知道他抓著的那個是鹿角.
They keep yelling like that, unaware that what they are holding onto are antlers.

S.FORM: a macindangkaz saia a miliskin tu ana mudaanta ua aiza maza pais namadamu siatu mamita hai nii tu haiap tu maza uvaaz hai ka talinadadaza sia isaicia tu lutbucia.
S.PHON: a maʨindaŋkað saia a mil~ɬiskin tu ana mudaanta ua aiða maða pais namadamu ɕiatu mamita x~χai nii tu x~χaiap tu maða uvaað x~χai ka tal~ɬinadadaða ɕia isaiʨia tu l~ɬutbuʨia.
S.FORM: a macindangkaz saia a miliskin tu ana mudaanta ua aiza maza pais namadamu siatu mamita hai nii tu haiap tu maza uvaaz hai ka talinadadaza sia isaicia tu lutbucia.
S.PHON: a maʨindaŋkað saia a mil~ɬiskin tu ana mudaanta ua aiða maða pais namadamu ɕiatu mamita x~χai nii tu x~χaiap tu maða uvaað x~χai ka tal~ɬinadadaða ɕia isaiʨia tu l~ɬutbuʨia.

TRANSL.notes: 他(鹿)突然站起來,認為「因為有敵人要抓我們,我們要趕快走.」不知道那個孩子就扶在他的身體上.

S.TRANSL: 他 突然站起來,認為「因為有敵人要抓我們,我們要趕快走.」不知道那個孩子就扶在他的身體上.

TRANSL.notes: It (the deer) suddenly stands up and leaves because it thinking there are rivals going to catch us, without knowing the kid is still on its back.

S.TRANSL: It suddenly stands up and leaves because it thinking there are rivals going to catch us, without knowing the kid is still on its back.

S.FORM: ki'ama'amaun saicia macisbai maza ngabula.
S.PHON: kiʔamaʔamaun saiʨia maʨisbai maða ŋabul~ɬa.
S.FORM: ki'ama'amaun saicia macisbai maza ngabula.
S.PHON: kiʔamaʔamaun saiʨia maʨisbai maða ŋabul~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 他背著他們逃跑了
It runs away with them on its back.

S.FORM: a makilavi amin sia tu asua a kinkikinuz mas isain sia isaicia tu am a ai bununcia maupacia tu maza ngabula hai mudaan hai.
S.PHON: a makil~ɬavi amin ɕia tu asua a kinkikinuð mas isain ɕia isaiʨia tu am a ai bununʨia maupaʨia tu maða ŋabul~ɬa x~χai mudaan x~χai.
S.FORM: a makilavi amin sia tu asua a kinkikinuz mas isain sia isaicia tu am a ai bununcia maupacia tu maza ngabula hai mudaan hai.
S.PHON: a makil~ɬavi amin ɕia tu asua a kinkikinuð mas isain ɕia isaiʨia tu am a ai bununʨia maupaʨia tu maða ŋabul~ɬa x~χai mudaan x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗跟在他的主人後面,就這樣,鹿就這樣走了.
The dog follows its master and the deer leaves.

S.FORM: sadu mas tanangaus tu nais'ukin a daan at.
S.PHON: sadu mas tanaŋaus tu naisʔukin a daan at.
S.FORM: sadu mas tanangaus tu nais'ukin a daan at.
S.PHON: sadu mas tanaŋaus tu naisʔukin a daan at.
S.TRANSL: 鹿看到他的前面已經沒有路了
The deer sees there is no more roads in front.

W.TRANSL: 非實現=工焦-否定.存在=狀態改變

S.FORM: a isian sia mangdavan hai pan'utung a saia hai nii tu haiap tu maza uvaaza hai istaibiskav aupa uka massia mahunduh tu talinadaan.
S.PHON: a iɕian ɕia maŋdavan x~χai panʔutuŋ a saia x~χai nii tu x~χaiap tu maða uvaaða x~χai istaibiskav aupa uka masɕia max~χundux~χ tu tal~ɬinadaan.
S.FORM: a isian sia mangdavan hai pan'utung a saia hai nii tu haiap tu maza uvaaza hai istaibiskav aupa uka massia mahunduh tu talinadaan.
S.PHON: a iɕian ɕia maŋdavan x~χai panʔutuŋ a saia x~χai nii tu x~χaiap tu maða uvaaða x~χai istaibiskav aupa uka masɕia max~χundux~χ tu tal~ɬinadaan.
S.TRANSL: 鹿在懸崖停了下來,不知道孩子因為沒抓緊被甩出去了.
The deers stops at the cliff, without knowing that kid is cast away because he does not hold tightly.

S.FORM: istaibiskav hai muhalhal naia lanangadah sia 'ung'ung.
S.PHON: istaibiskav x~χai mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ naia l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ɕia ʔuŋʔuŋ.
S.FORM: istaibiskav hai muhalhal naia lanangadah sia 'ung'ung.
S.PHON: istaibiskav x~χai mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ naia l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ɕia ʔuŋʔuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他們被丟落到溪谷裡面了.
Being cast, they drops into the gully.

S.FORM: isian sia maupa tu aupa isia kalapatancin hai tanngadah hai aiza siatu vahlas at uvaaza mas asucia hai lanangadah sia danum.
S.PHON: iɕian ɕia maupa tu aupa iɕia kal~ɬapatanʨin x~χai tanŋadax~χ x~χai aiða ɕiatu vax~χl~ɬas at uvaaða mas asuʨia x~χai l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ɕia danum.
S.FORM: isian sia maupa tu aupa isia kalapatancin hai tanngadah hai aiza siatu vahlas at uvaaza mas asucia hai lanangadah sia danum.
S.PHON: iɕian ɕia maupa tu aupa iɕia kal~ɬapatanʨin x~χai tanŋadax~χ x~χai aiða ɕiatu vax~χl~ɬas at uvaaða mas asuʨia x~χai l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ɕia danum.
S.TRANSL: 在這樣的懸崖,因為底下有河流,孩子和狗就掉到水裡.
At this kind of cliff, because there is river below, the kid and dog drop into the water.

S.FORM: a maupacia naia tu a sungkat.
S.PHON: a maupaʨia naia tu a suŋkat.
S.FORM: a maupacia naia tu a sungkat.
S.PHON: a maupaʨia naia tu a suŋkat.
S.TRANSL: 他們就這樣過河
They cross the river.

S.FORM: a minnasian sia sisila a usaduan massia lukis tu sia a minunhanu tu mahalivin.
S.PHON: a minnaɕian ɕia ɕiɕil~ɬa a usaduan masɕia l~ɬukis tu ɕia a minunx~χanu tu max~χal~ɬivin.
S.FORM: a minnasian sia sisila a usaduan massia lukis tu sia a minunhanu tu mahalivin.
S.PHON: a minnaɕian ɕia ɕiɕil~ɬa a usaduan masɕia l~ɬukis tu ɕia a minunx~χanu tu max~χal~ɬivin.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)到了河邊看到乾了的漂流木.

S.TRANSL: 到了河邊看到乾了的漂流木.

TRANSL.notes: (They) arrive at the riverside and see a drift wood.

S.TRANSL: arrive at the riverside and see a drift wood.

S.FORM: at aupa tupaun saicia asua tu a kaain matahusing aupa mais muhna kasu mutmang lalunglung hai a namaupacia tu a usupahan mas isian sia painladuan maupacia tu sia a cinhuzaun ma'ita mahtu inkaduan mas sisiuhcia hai maupacia naia tu.
S.PHON: at aupa tupaun saiʨia asua tu a kaain matax~χuɕiŋ aupa mais mux~χna kasu mutmaŋ l~ɬal~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ x~χai a namaupaʨia tu a usupax~χan mas iɕian ɕia painl~ɬaduan maupaʨia tu ɕia a ʨinx~χuðaun maʔita max~χtu inkaduan mas ɕiɕiux~χʨia x~χai maupaʨia naia tu.
S.FORM: at aupa tupaun saicia asua tu a kaain matahusing aupa mais muhna kasu mutmang lalunglung hai a namaupacia tu a usupahan mas isian sia painladuan maupacia tu sia a cinhuzaun ma'ita mahtu inkaduan mas sisiuhcia hai maupacia naia tu.
S.PHON: at aupa tupaun saiʨia asua tu a kaain matax~χuɕiŋ aupa mais mux~χna kasu mutmaŋ l~ɬal~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ x~χai a namaupaʨia tu a usupax~χan mas iɕian ɕia painl~ɬaduan maupaʨia tu ɕia a ʨinx~χuðaun maʔita max~χtu inkaduan mas ɕiɕiux~χʨia x~χai maupaʨia naia tu.
S.TRANSL: 他叫狗不要吵鬧,因為你再亂叫的話就會那樣,會遇到很多我們在找青蛙時遇到的事情那樣.
He tells the dog 'Be quiet! If you bark again as you want, bad things like what we came across when we were seeking the frog will happen.'

S.FORM: tungnadadaza sia lukiscia hai isnadadaza naia sia lukiscia islunghu hai ais usaduan naia tu a supahdaingaz hangsia sisiuh isaincinin.
S.PHON: tuŋnadadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai isnadadaða naia ɕia l~ɬukisʨia isl~ɬuŋx~χu x~χai ais usaduan naia tu a supax~χdaiŋað x~χaŋɕia ɕiɕiux~χ isainʨinin.
S.FORM: tungnadadaza sia lukiscia hai isnadadaza naia sia lukiscia islunghu hai ais usaduan naia tu a supahdaingaz hangsia sisiuh isaincinin.
S.PHON: tuŋnadadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai isnadadaða naia ɕia l~ɬukisʨia isl~ɬuŋx~χu x~χai ais usaduan naia tu a supax~χdaiŋað x~χaŋɕia ɕiɕiux~χ isainʨinin.
S.TRANSL: 他們躲到枯木上休息時,看到原來有很多青蛙在這裡了.
When they hide and rest on the deadwood, they see so many frogs there.

W.TRANSL: 在-處格.近距=近距.斜格=改變狀態

S.FORM: a manaskal naia sadu sisiuh tu supahdaingaz musasu saduan naicia hai ai avadii inaicia sinaipuk tu sisiuha.
S.PHON: a manaskal~ɬ naia sadu ɕiɕiux~χ tu supax~χdaiŋað musasu saduan naiʨia x~χai ai avadii inaiʨia ɕinaipuk tu ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: a manaskal naia sadu sisiuh tu supahdaingaz musasu saduan naicia hai ai avadii inaicia sinaipuk tu sisiuha.
S.PHON: a manaskal~ɬ naia sadu ɕiɕiux~χ tu supax~χdaiŋað musasu saduan naiʨia x~χai ai avadii inaiʨia ɕinaipuk tu ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 當他們正高興看到很多青蛙時,他們看到了他們養的那隻青蛙.
While they are happy for seeing so many frogs, the find the frog they kept.

S.FORM: a suii aupahasia izaun naicia a mazasia tu inaicia sathasan naicia sadu tu avadii sisiuh sinaipuk naicia hai izaun naicia at aupa.
S.PHON: a suii aupax~χaɕia iðaun naiʨia a maðaɕia tu inaiʨia satx~χasan naiʨia sadu tu avadii ɕiɕiux~χ ɕinaipuk naiʨia x~χai iðaun naiʨia at aupa.
S.FORM: a suii aupahasia izaun naicia a mazasia tu inaicia sathasan naicia sadu tu avadii sisiuh sinaipuk naicia hai izaun naicia at aupa.
S.PHON: a suii aupax~χaɕia iðaun naiʨia a maðaɕia tu inaiʨia satx~χasan naiʨia sadu tu avadii ɕiɕiux~χ ɕinaipuk naiʨia x~χai iðaun naiʨia at aupa.
S.TRANSL: 所以他們把那隻青蛙拿起來看青楚,是他們養的那隻青蛙.
So they take the frog and look at it. That is the frog they kept.

S.FORM: masi'aupa massia dangian mas supah tu sisiuhcin tupa tu uninang naadasunku dii sisiuhin a maupacia tu mudaanin naia kulumah.
S.PHON: maɕiʔaupa masɕia daŋian mas supax~χ tu ɕiɕiux~χʨin tupa tu uninaŋ naadasunku dii ɕiɕiux~χin a maupaʨia tu mudaanin naia kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.FORM: masi'aupa massia dangian mas supah tu sisiuhcin tupa tu uninang naadasunku dii sisiuhin a maupacia tu mudaanin naia kulumah.
S.PHON: maɕiʔaupa masɕia daŋian mas supax~χ tu ɕiɕiux~χʨin tupa tu uninaŋ naadasunku dii ɕiɕiux~χin a maupaʨia tu mudaanin naia kul~ɬumax~χ.
S.TRANSL: 他們對著青蛙棲地說著謝謝,就這樣帶著那隻青蛙離開回家了.
'Thank you' to the frogs they say, and take the frog home.
